# BLOOD CODE

> BLOOD CODE (also written Bloodcode) is a hardcore, happy hardcore and J-core music producer creating high-energy, VGM-inspired electronic tracks and remixes.

## About
BLOOD CODE produces hardcore, happy hardcore, and J-core music with a video-game-music (VGM) influence. The official website at https://bloodco.de features a music player streaming the latest releases and remixes.

## Listen & Follow
- SoundCloud: https://soundcloud.com/bloodcode
- YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/c/BLOODCODE
- Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/artist/3yNDCk0iRKefkfpiPhaVPv
- Apple Music: https://music.apple.com/in/artist/blood-code/719143762
- Bandcamp: https://bloodcode.bandcamp.com/
- Discord: https://discord.gg/tPS9SfVGq
